title: Trimming Shop 20gm Lilac Purple Shredded Tissue Paper for Hampers Filling: Perfect Shredded Tissue Paper for Gift Packaging Filler Box Stuffing, and Decorative Presentation
features: Shredded tissue paper is eco-friendly and safe: our shredded tissue paper comes in packs of 20g, 100g, 200g, and 500g. Being eco-friendly benefits both the environment and your finances, providing plenty of materials for making multiple gift boxes, hampers, and baskets.
Various colour choices - our shredded tissue paper comes in a range of colours including white, turquoise blue, royal blue, red, lilac purple, Christmas green, brown, black, and beige.
Multi-functional and appealing packaging option - this shredded paper not only protects your gifts but also enhances the visual appeal of your packaging.
Perfect for all kinds of events - whether it's a birthday, wedding, anniversary, Christmas, or party, this shredded tissue paper is a flexible decorative accessory that fits every celebration.
Before using shredded packaging filler, make sure to fluff it up for the best presentation to achieve optimal results.
description: Product Description Secure Your Gifts with Style Shredded Tissue Paper Trimming Shop shredded tissue paper offers soft yet effective cushioning, ideal for protecting delicate items during transit. This lightweight filler ensures everything stays in place, while its shock-absorbing qualities protect fragile objects like glassware, ceramics, delicate items, etc. Available in colours Choose from a range of vibrant colours, including classic white, striking turquoise blue, royal blue, red, lilac purple, green, brown, black, and beige. Whether you’re wrapping gifts for a special event, or enhancing retail packaging, we offer colours to match your theme. Strong Shock Absorption These paper shreds offer excellent protection and strong shock absorption, which are ideal for safeguarding delicate items like glassware and fragile objects. Lightweight Fill Shredded tissue paper for packing is perfect for filling in those extra spaces in your packing boxes, ensuring your items are snug and secure during transit. High-Quality Material Our shredded paper is made from premium tissue paper that is craft-shredded, soft, lightweight, and dust-free, ensuring a clean and professional presentation Multiple Pack Sizes With pack options of 20g, 100g, 200g, and 500g, you can choose the ideal amount of shredded tissue paper for your specific project. Whether you need a little for a small gift or a large amount for hampers and bulk packaging, we’ve got you covered. Trimming Shop’s Shredded Tissue Paper offers both style and substance. With high-quality material, a wide range of colours, and flexible pack sizes, it's the perfect choice for all your gifting and packaging needs. Make your gifts stand out with elegance and care! Ideal for gift wrapping for Halloween, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, weddings, birthdays, Easter egg baskets, Christmas, and other holidays.
